series_metadata.series_title: Enacted Bills from the General Assembly
series_metadata.series_description: Master bill tracking files that include enacted bills and bill analyses for the following catagories: active interest, AOS boards, campaigns, municipalities, counties, crime, FWAP, land, MIS, Personnel, Libraries, Schools, special districts, state audits, townships, universities, villages (include any supporting documentation and notes from meetings).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office, 7 years in records
